message:
feat(ws): add event loss telemetry for ring buffers (bd-2gkx.2)

RingBuffer now tracks drop statistics:
- capacityEvictions: count of FIFO evictions when buffer overflows
- ttlExpirations: count of items pruned due to TTL expiry
- lastEvictionAt / lastExpirationAt timestamps

Hub aggregates per-buffer stats into HubStats.eventLoss:
- totalCapacityEvictions, totalTtlExpirations, totalSendFailures
- lastDropAt timestamp
- byChannel breakdown (only channels with drops)

Send failures in publish() are now counted for telemetry.
7 passing unit tests for drop stats tracking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
